description: Create a custom form in HospitalRun's Administration section named 'Fall Risk Assessment' with the form type 'Visit'. The form must include the following fields in order: 'Age Group' (property: 'ageGroup', type: 'Text'), 'Fall History' (property: 'fallHistory', type: 'Select', values: 'None,One fall in past 6 months,Multiple falls'), 'Mobility Status' (property: 'mobilityStatus', type: 'Select', values: 'Independent,Uses assistive device,Requires assistance'), 'Cognitive Impairment' (property: 'cognitiveImpairment', type: 'Checkbox'), and 'Assessment Notes' (property: 'assessmentNotes', type: 'Text Area'). Save the completed form.
